result.stderr:
dotnet_antlr 3.1.5
Copyright (C) 2026 dotnet_antlr

  --all_source_pattern                R.E. for all source files to use.

  --antlr-tool-args                   

  --antlr-tool-path                   

  -c, --case-fold                     Fold case of lexer. True = upper, false =
                                      lower.

  --case-insensitive-type             

  --env-type                          

  --example-files                     

  -f, --file                          The name of an input file to parse.

  --flatten                           Flatten files in target into non-nested
                                      directory.

  --grammar-name                      The grammar name.

  --lexer-name                        The name of the lexer.

  --go-lexer-name                     The name of the lexer.

  -e, --line-translation              

  -m, --maven                         Read Antlr pom file and convert.

  -n, --name-space                    The namespace for all generated files.

  -o, --output-directory              The output directory for the project.

  --parser-name                       The name of the parser.

  --go-parser-name                    

  --path-sep                          

  -x, --profile                       Add in Antlr profiling code.

  -k, --skip-list                     A skip list for pom.xml.

  -s, --start-rule                    Start rule name.

  -t, --target                        The target language for the project.

  --template-sources-directory        

  --todo-pattern                      Replacement for skip-list. R.E. on what to
                                      do, what not to do, of the grammars in the
                                      poms.

  -g, --tool-grammar-files-pattern    A list of vertical bar separated grammar
                                      file paths.

  --help                              Display this help screen.

  --version                           Display version information.
